issues.title: test_results.json not generated
issues.description: Core test results file is missing. Cannot perform failure analysis, regression detection, or fix prioritization without this data.
actionable_steps: Create test result aggregator script: tools/autodev/aggregate_test_results.ps1
Execute validate_editor_parse.ps1 and capture output
Execute validate_flow_order.ps1 and capture output
Parse logs and generate test_results.json with schema: {timestamp, cycle, total_tests, passed, failed, skipped, failures[], domains{}}
Integrate into AUTODEV cycle pipeline

issues.title: stats_summary.json not generated
issues.description: Performance and coverage metrics file is missing. Cannot track code coverage, LLM performance, Triade state coverage, or ending coverage.
issues.impact: No baseline metrics for performance regression detection
actionable_steps: Define stats_summary.json schema with coverage, performance, triade_coverage fields
Create stats aggregator script: tools/autodev/generate_stats_summary.ps1
Integrate GUT test runner output parsing (when GUT installed)
Add LLM performance logging to MerlinAI/MerlinOmniscient
Track Triade state coverage in MerlinStore dispatch logging

issues.title: GUT framework not installed
issues.description: Godot Unit Testing (GUT) framework is not installed. Zero automated unit/integration test coverage exists.
issues.impact: Cannot write or run automated tests for core systems (MerlinStore, CardSystem, LLM pipeline, etc.)
actionable_steps: Clone GUT to addons/gut: git clone https://github.com/bitwes/Gut.git addons/gut
Enable GUT plugin in Godot Editor (Project Settings > Plugins > GUT > Enable)
Create test directories: test/unit/ and test/integration/
Write initial test suite: test/unit/test_merlin_store.gd (5 tests for aspect state transitions)
Configure GUT runner in project settings
Add GUT execution to validate.bat pipeline

issues.title: Screenshot scene list unpopulated
issues.description: Screenshot report shows 14 total scenes but 0 identified/captured. Scene list configuration is empty or misconfigured.
issues.impact: Visual regression testing non-functional. Cannot detect UI/rendering issues.
actionable_steps: Locate screenshot capture script configuration
Populate scene list with 8 core scenes: IntroCeltOS, MenuPrincipal, IntroPersonalityQuiz, SceneRencontreMerlin, SelectionSauvegarde, HubAntre, TransitionBiome, MerlinGame
Re-run screenshot capture to verify configuration
Validate screenshots_report.json shows 8/8 captured

issues.title: Zero edge case coverage
issues.description: None of the 10 critical edge cases documented in debug_qa.md are tested. Risk of undetected bugs in extreme game states.
issues.impact: Potential game-breaking bugs in edge cases (extreme aspects, souffle=0, LLM timeout, etc.) will only be discovered by players.
actionable_steps: Create test/unit/test_edge_cases.gd
Write tests for: (1) all 3 aspects at extreme, (2) Souffle at 0, (3) empty card queue + LLM timeout
Write tests for: (4) rapid button clicking, (5) scene transitions mid-animation, (6) Bond at 0 and 100
Write tests for: (7) all 16 endings reachable, (8) Karma at extremes, (9) Talent Tree unlock failures, (10) save/load mid-run
Document discovered bugs in fix_priorities.json for next cycle

immediate: Execute INFRA-001 to unblock test review pipeline
Execute INFRA-003 to establish automated testing foundation
Execute TEST-001 to enable visual regression testing
short_term: Execute INFRA-002 to track performance/coverage metrics
Execute TEST-002 to improve edge case coverage
long_term: Implement Triade state coverage campaign (343 combinations)
Create LLM narrative golden dataset (50+ cards)
Build E2E testing for all 16 endings
